item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.1: An unexpected ally may just be a wandering trader in disguise.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.2: Your inventory is full, perhaps it is time to let something go.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.3: Your next creation will outshine your last.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.5: One emerald can open many doors.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.6: You will soon build something of lasting value.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.7: Patience will bring success, one block at a time.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.8: You are surrounded by hidden possibilities.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.9: The well traveled soul will find their plate filled aplenty.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.10: A change in direction will lead to unexpected resources.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.11: Your next mining trip will go deeper than intended.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.12: You will lose something in lava and learn nothing from it.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.13: You hate the taste of fortune cookies.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.14: Not all who wander are lost... some are just looking for Fizz.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.15: You may not rest now, there are monsters nearby.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.16: You will sprint for safety and discover gravity is faster.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.17: The next meal you cook will be a masterpiece.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.18: A village of new friendships is generating nearby.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.19: Something sits at the edge of reality, waiting for the door to open.
item.cnk.fortune_cookie.fortune.20: A quiet moment leads to a useful discovery.
item.cnk.calendar.delta.format.base: This bottle has been aged for %1$s
item.cnk.music_disc_dinner.desc: Marius Chamberlin - In Time For Dinner
item.cnk.music_disc_meal.desc: Marius Chamberlin - A Meal With Friends
painting.cnk.discipline.author: Psydoux
painting.cnk.star-crossed_lovers.author: Crisp
painting.cnk.vibe_creature.author: Crisp
painting.cnk.lost.author: Crisp
painting.cnk.comforted_gothic.author: evergreenavery
cnk.speak.1: Shadows carve the truth where light cannot reach... carved with a knife of obsidian and bone.
cnk.speak.2: The roots drink deeper than the branches know... what grows beneath is never what blooms above.
cnk.speak.3: A thousand eyes blink shut, but the one that never sleeps already sees your choice.
cnk.speak.4: The knife waits not for flesh, but for truth... carve me open, and you will be shown the way.
cnk.speak.5: You count the stars, blind to the black between them.
cnk.speak.6: The seed that screams is already grown, though you will not hear its flowering.
cnk.speak.7: All threads lead to the loom, yet you are unable to see the hands that move upon it.
cnk.speak.8: Lay me upon the board of butchery and carve deep, that I may teach you what bleeds unseen.
cnk.speak.9: Only obsidian may pierce the veil, its edge reveals the truth that writhes beneath.
cnk.speak.10: Iron clatters, blind and dull... it scrapes the surface, but never the soul.
cnk.meat_guide.hint: Raise me high, and the world will crawl to meet you... yet when the path is spent, lay me upon the altar, and all will bow in silence.
cnk.shrine.1: The way is open... a gate of flesh, a door of thought... all yielding, all undone. It does not come. It arrives.
cnk.dialog.description: A cozy cooking datapack that adds new food, drinks and more!
cnk.dialog.unlock_cookbook.tooltip: Fully unlocks your cookbook, revealing all recipes and ingredients
cnk.dialog.reset_cookbook.tooltip: Fully resets your cookbook, hiding all recipes and ingredients
cnk.dialog.cookbook.confirmation:
Warning! This is irreversible, any current progress in the cookbook will be lost permanently.

Are you sure you wish to continue?
cnk.dialog.settings.toasts.tooltip: Enables or disables the toasts that appear when you pick up a new ingredient or unlock a new recipe
cnk.dialog.settings.admin_panel.explanat: The admin panel allows for control over certain aspects of this datapack.
cnk.dialog.settings.admin_panel.command: Run the following command to open the admin panel:
cnk.dialog.admin_panel.tooltip: A panel used to modify the datapack
cnk.dialog.admin_panel.dynamic_command_f: Dynamic command feedback will disable the chat output from interacting with the cookbook while the cookbook is open.
Do note that on servers, this means that output from other commands will not appear in the chat while someone has a cookbook open.
cnk.dialog.admin_panel.days_in_a_year.no: The 'Days in a year' setting controls the wine aging mechanic, changing how many minecraft days it takes for wine to age.
cnk.dialog.admin_panel.disable_wine.note: Disabling a wine disables its crafting recipe, functionality and its page in the distiller book.
cnk.item_disabled: This item has been disabled by an administrator.
